entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the carrion crawler can see within 10 feet. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While Poisoned, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The centaur casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Druidcraft, Speak with Animals.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The centaur makes two attacks, using Forest Staff or Sun Ray in any combination.

action.name: Forest Staff
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) Poison damage.

action.name: Sun Ray
entries: Ranged Attack: +7 to hit, range 90 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Radiant damage, and the target has the Blinded condition until the start of the centaur's next turn.

bonus.name: Entangling Trail (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The centaur moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks. Each creature within 5 feet of the centaur as it moves is targeted once by the following effect. Strength Saving Throw: DC 15. Failure: 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Restrained condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the chasme dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The chasme has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The chasme can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Proboscis
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 16 (4d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, its Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken.

bonus.name: Drone
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the chasme (demons automatically succeed on this save). Failure: The target has the Unconscious condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. The target succeeds automatically after 10 minutes or if it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to empty a flask of Holy Water on it. Success: The target is immune to this chasme's Drone for 24 hours.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The cockatrice doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cockatrice makes one Petrifying Bite attack and two Talons attacks.

action.name: Petrifying Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Failure: The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

action.name: Talons
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

reaction.name: Magical Backlash
entries: Trigger: A creature within 120 feet of the cockatrice deals damage to it. Response:Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, the triggering creature. Failure: 13 (3d6 + 3) Force damage.

monster.name: Colossus
languages: understands Celestial and Common but can't speak

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The colossus can't shape-shift.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the colossus fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The colossus has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The colossus deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The colossus makes three attacks, using Slam or Radiant Ray in any combination.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Attack: +18 to hit, reach 20 ft. Hit: 32 (4d10 + 10) Bludgeoning damage, and the colossus pushes the target up to 20 feet straight away from itself.

action.name: Radiant Ray
entries: Ranged Attack: +18 to hit, range 300 ft. Hit: 22 (4d10) Radiant damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

action.name: Divine Beam (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 26, each creature in a 300-foot-long, 10-foot-wide Line. Failure: 65 (10d12) Radiant damage. Success: Half damage. Success or Failure: A creature reduced to 0 Hit Points by this beam disintegrates into dust, leaving behind any magic items it was wearing or carrying.

legendary.name: Smite
entries: The colossus makes one Radiant Ray attack.

legendary.name: Stomp
entries: The colossus moves up to half its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks, and it can make one Slam attack at any point during that move.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 Necrotic damage.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Thaumaturgy.
1/day each: Jallarzi's Storm of Radiance (level 7 version), Mass Suggestion.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three attacks, using Pact Blade or Radiant Ray in any combination.

action.name: Pact Blade
entries: Melee Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

action.name: Radiant Ray
entries: Ranged Attack: +9 to hit, range 120 ft. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) Radiant damage.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cyclops casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
1/day: Legend Lore.
2/day each: Arcane Eye, Detect Magic, Locate Object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cyclops makes three attacks, using Radiant Strike or Flash of Light in any combination.

action.name: Radiant Strike
entries: Melee Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) Radiant damage.

action.name: Flash of Light
entries: Ranged Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) Radiant damage, and the target has Disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of the cyclops's next turn.

reaction.name: Portent (Recharge 4-6)
entries: Trigger: The cyclops or an ally it can see makes a D20 Test. Response: The cyclops rolls 1d20 and chooses whether to use that roll in place of the d20 rolled for the D20 Test.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cyclops makes two attacks, using Stone Club or Rock in any combination.

action.name: Stone Club
entries: Melee Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 16 (3d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

action.name: Rock
entries: Ranged Attack: +9 to hit, range 30/120 ft. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

reaction.name: Limited Foresight (Recharge 6)
entries: Trigger: A creature the cyclops can see makes an attack roll against it. Response: The cyclops imposes Disadvantage on the roll, and the cyclops gains Advantage on attack rolls against the target until the end of the cyclops's next turn.

trait.name: Earth Glide
entries: The dao can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dao doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the dao dies outside the Elemental Plane of Earth, its body dissolves into dirt, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Earth.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dao has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Wishes
entries: The dao has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the dao knows it, the dao can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the dao can understand. If the dao casts the spell for the creature, the dao suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the dao has cast it three times, the dao can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dao casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Stone Shape.
1/day each: Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Move Earth, Passwall, Plane Shift, Tongues, Wall of Stone.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dao makes three Earthen Maul attacks or two Earth Burst attacks.

action.name: Earthen Maul
entries: Melee Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 20 (4d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

action.name: Earth Burst
entries: Ranged Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. Hit or Miss: Earth explodes from the target's space, creating the following effect. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 16, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from and including the target. Failure: 10 (3d6) Thunder damage.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Speak with Dead, Thaumaturgy.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three attacks, using Dread Scythe or Deathly Ray in any combination.

action.name: Dread Scythe
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage, and the target can't regain Hit Points until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Deathly Ray
entries: Ranged Attack: +6 to hit, range 120 ft. Hit: 22 (4d10) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Spirit Wail (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation originating from the cultist. Failure: 14 (4d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The aspirant has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Marshal Undead
entries: Undead creatures of the aspirant's choice (excluding itself) in a 60-foot Emanation originating from it have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The aspirant casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Phantom Steed.
1/day each: Destructive Wave (Necrotic), Dispel Magic.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The aspirant makes three Dread Blade attacks.

action.name: Dread Blade
entries: Melee Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Hellfire Orb (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point the aspirant can see within 120 feet of itself. Failure: 21 (6d6) Fire damage plus 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: Trigger: The aspirant is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The aspirant adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The slaad regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The slaad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Invisibility (self only), Mage Hand, Major Image.
1/day each: Blight (level 8 version), Cloudkill (level 6 version), Fly, Plane Shift, Tongues.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The slaad makes two Chaos Blade attacks.

action.name: Chaos Blade
entries: Melee Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (1d12 + 5) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. Until the start of the slaad's next turn, the target has a condition determined by rolling 1d4: on a 1, Charmed; on a 2, Frightened; on a 3, Poisoned; or on a 4, Incapacitated.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The slaad shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the death tyrant fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The death tyrant uses Eye Rays three times.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 feet. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

action.name: Eye Rays
entries: The death tyrant randomly shoots one of the following magical rays at a target it can see within 120 feet of itself (roll 1d10; reroll if the death tyrant has already used that ray during this turn):

items.name: 1: Charm Ray
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 17. Failure: 13 (3d8) Psychic damage, and the target has the Charmed condition for 1 hour or until it takes damage. Success: Half damage only.

items.name: 2: Paralyzing Ray
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 17. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

items.name: 3: Fear Ray
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 17. Failure: 10 (3d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only.

items.name: 4: Slowing Ray
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 17. Failure: 18 (4d8) Necrotic damage. Until the end of the target's next turn, the target can't take Reactions; its Speed is halved; and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. Success: Half damage only.

items.name: 5: Enervation Ray
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 17. Failure: 16 (3d10) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the target can't regain Hit Points. Success: Half damage only.

items.name: 6: Telekinetic Ray
entries: Strength Saving Throw: DC 17 (the target succeeds automatically if it is Gargantuan). Failure: The death tyrant moves the target up to 30 feet in any direction. The target has the Restrained condition until the start of the death tyrant's next turn or until the death tyrant has the Incapacitated condition. The death tyrant can also exert fine control on objects with this ray, such as manipulating a tool or opening a door or container.

items.name: 7: Sleep Ray
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 17 (the target succeeds automatically if it is a Construct or an Undead). Failure: The target has the Unconscious condition for 1 minute. The condition ends if the target takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

items.name: 8: Petrification Ray
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 17. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Failure: The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

items.name: 9: Disintegration Ray
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17. Failure: 36 (8d8) Force damage. If the target is a nonmagical object or a creation of magical force, a 10-foot Cube of it disintegrates into dust. Success: Half damage. Success or Failure: If the target is a creature and this damage reduces it to 0 Hit Points, it disintegrates into dust.

items.name: 10: Death Ray
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17. Failure: 55 (10d10) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage. Success or Failure: The target dies if the ray reduces it to 0 Hit Points.

bonus.name: Negative Energy Cone
entries: The death tyrant's central eye emits an imperceptible, magical wave of negative energy in a 150-foot Cone. Creatures in that area can't regain Hit Points until the start of the death tyrant's next turn. An intact Humanoid corpse there instantly rises as a Zombie under the death tyrant's control and takes its turn immediately after the death tyrant on the same initiative count.

legendary.name: Chomp
entries: The death tyrant makes two Bite attacks.

legendary.name: Glare
entries: The death tyrant uses Eye Rays.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the demilich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the demilich is destroyed, it reforms and regains all its Hit Points in 1d10 days unless a Wish spell is cast on its remains.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The demilich makes three Necrotic Burst attacks.

action.name: Necrotic Burst
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 24 (7d6) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Howl (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 19, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the demilich. Failure: 70 (20d6) Psychic damage. Success or Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the start of the demilich's next turn.

legendary.name: Energy Drain
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 19, one creature the demilich can see within 120 feet. Failure: The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by 14 (4d6). Success or Failure: The demilich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Grave-Dust Flight
entries: The demilich flies up to its Fly Speed, shedding grave dust. Each creature within 5 feet of the demilich as it moves is targeted once by the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 19. Failure: The target has the Blinded condition until the end of the demilich's next turn. Success or Failure: The demilich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Necrosis
entries: The demilich makes one Necrotic Burst attack.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The worg has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The worg makes three Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the worg's next turn. While Poisoned, the target can't regain Hit Points.

action.name: Dreadful Howl (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 16, each creature within 30 feet that isn't a worg. Failure: 36 (8d8) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the worg's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

bonus.name: Warp Step
entries: The worg teleports, along with a willing creature of its choice within 5 feet of it, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

trait.name: Avoidance
entries: If the displacer beast is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

trait.name: Displacement
entries: Attack rolls against the displacer beast have Disadvantage, since it projects an illusion that makes it appear to be near its actual location. This trait is suppressed while the displacer beast has the Incapacitated condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The displacer beast makes one Rend attack and one Tentacle attack.

action.name: Rend
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 feet. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage. If target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 feet. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dracolich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Life Suppression
entries: Creatures within 60 feet of the dracolich can't regain Hit Points.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dracolich has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Soul Gem
entries: The dracolich has a magical gem. If the dracolich is destroyed while the gem is on the same plane of existence as it, the dracolich gains a new body in 1d20 days, regaining all its Hit Points and appearing within 5 feet of the gem.

The gem is a Tiny object that has AC 20; HP 50; and Immunity to Necrotic, Poison, and Psychic damage. The gem regains all its Hit Points at the end of every turn, but it turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points. If the gem is destroyed, the dracolich can create a new one by completing an 8-hour ritual using a gem worth 1,000+ GP and by expending 5,000 GP, which the ritual consumes.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dracolich casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 19, +11 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Detect Magic, Ray of Sickness (level 2 version).
1/day each: Create Undead (level 8 version), Finger of Death.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dracolich makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Ray of Sickness (level 2 version).

action.name: Rend
entries: Melee Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Necrotic Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 52 (8d12) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage.

legendary.name: Pounce
entries: The dracolich moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendary.name: Sickening Ray
entries: The dracolich uses Spellcasting to cast Ray of Sickness (level 2 version). The dracolich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Terrifying Presence
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 19, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the dracolich. Failure: 11 (2d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn. Success or Failure: The dracolich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Earth Glide
entries: The cataclysm can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the cataclysm doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the cataclysm fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The cataclysm deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Control Weather
entries: The cataclysm casts the Control Weather spell, requiring no spell components and using Constitution as the spellcasting ability.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cataclysm makes two Elemental Burst attacks.

action.name: Elemental Burst
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +15 to hit, reach 30 ft. or range 150 ft. Hit: 25 (5d6 + 8) damage of a type chosen by the cataclysm: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder.

action.name: Cataclysmic Event (Recharge 4-6)
entries: The cataclysm creates one of the following effects at random (roll 1d4):

items.name: 1: Clinging Flames
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature in a 60-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point the cataclysm can see within 150 feet. Failure: 45 (13d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage. Success or Failure: The target starts burning.

items.name: 2: Freezing Waves
entries: Strength Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature in a 90-foot Cone. Failure: 22 (5d8) Bludgeoning damage plus 22 (5d8) Cold damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only. Success or Failure: The target's Speed is reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

items.name: 3: Raging Storm
entries: A storm cloud fills a 60-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point the cataclysm can see within 150 feet. The cloud lasts for 1 minute or until the cataclysm uses Cataclysmic Event again. Creatures entirely in the cloud have the Blinded and Deafened conditions and can't cast spells with a Verbal component. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature that enters the cloud for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there. Failure: 18 (4d8) Lightning damage plus 18 (4d8) Thunder damage. Success: Half damage.

items.name: 4: Swallowing Earth
entries: Strength Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature in a 90-foot Cube originating from a point on the ground within 150 feet. Failure: 18 (4d8) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Acid damage, and the target has the Prone condition and is buried under rubble. A buried target has the Restrained condition, has Total Cover, and is suffocating. As an action, a buried creature or another creature within 5 feet of it can make a DC 18 Strength (Athletics) check. On a successful check, the creature is no longer buried. Success: Half damage only.

legendary.name: Eruption
entries: The cataclysm makes one Elemental Burst attack.

legendary.name: Rumbling Movement
entries: The cataclysm moves up to its Speed, Fly Speed, or Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks. Each creature within 5 feet of the cataclysm as it moves is targeted once by the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 23. Failure: The target has the Prone condition. Success or Failure: The cataclysm can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Elementalism, Mage Hand.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three attacks, using Elemental Flail or Elemental Claw in any combination.

action.name: Elemental Flail
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 25 (6d6 + 4) damage of a type chosen by the cultist: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder.

action.name: Elemental Claw
entries: Ranged Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft. Hit: 22 (4d10) damage of a type chosen by the cultist: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the cultist moves the target up to 10 feet straight toward or away from itself.

reaction.name: Elemental Absorption (1/Day)
entries: Trigger: The cultist takes Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder damage. Response: The cultist gives itself Resistance to that instance of damage and gains 10 Temporary Hit Points.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the empyrean fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The empyrean has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The empyrean casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 23):
At will: Calm Emotions, Greater Restoration, Pass without Trace, Water Breathing.
1/day each: Commune, Dispel Evil and Good, Plane Shift.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The empyrean makes two attacks, using Sacred Weapon or Divine Ray in any combination.

action.name: Sacred Weapon
entries: Melee Attack: +17 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 31 (6d6 + 10) Force damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the start of the empyrean's next turn. The target can choose not to be Stunned, in which case it takes an extra 21 Force damage that bypasses Resistance or Immunity.

action.name: Divine Ray
entries: Ranged Attack: +15 to hit, range 600 ft. Hit: 35 (6d8 + 8) Necrotic or Radiant damage (empyrean's choice).

legendary.name: Bolster
entries: The empyrean gains 10 Temporary Hit Points, and the empyrean and each ally within 30 feet of it gain Advantage on D20 Tests until the end of the empyrean's next turn. The empyrean can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Shockwave of Glory
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the empyrean. Failure: 27 (6d8) Force damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only. Success or Failure: The empyrean can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Smite
entries: The empyrean makes one Divine Ray attack.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The empyrean can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The empyrean has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The empyrean casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:
1/day each: Bless, Lesser Restoration (as an action).

action.name: Otherworldly Strike
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Necrotic or Radiant damage (empyrean's choice).

bonus.name: Healing Word (1/Day)
entries: The empyrean casts Healing Word, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dragon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Dancing Lights, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion.
1/day each: Hallucinatory Terrain, Polymorph.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Psychic damage.

action.name: Euphoria Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target has the Incapacitated condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While Incapacitated, the target uses all its movement on each of its turns to move in a random direction.

bonus.name: Superior Invisibility
entries: The dragon casts Greater Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dragon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):
At will: Dancing Lights, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Psychic damage.

action.name: Euphoria Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn and uses all its movement on its turn to move in a random direction.

bonus.name: Superior Invisibility
entries: The dragon casts Greater Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Scorching Ray (level 5 version), Thaumaturgy.
2/day: Fireball (level 6 version).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three Pact Axe attacks.

action.name: Pact Axe
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) Slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) Fire damage.

reaction.name: Hellish Rebuke
entries: The cultist casts Hellish Rebuke in response to that spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The flameskull sheds Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 15 feet.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The flameskull has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the flameskull is destroyed, it regains all its Hit Points in 1 hour unless Holy Water is sprinkled on its remains or the Dispel Evil and Good spell is cast on them.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The flameskull casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Mage Hand.
1/day: Fireball.
2/day: Magic Missile (level 2 version).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The flameskull makes two Fire Ray attacks.

action.name: Fire Ray
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) Fire damage.

monster.name: Flaming Skeleton
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

trait.name: Death Burst
entries: The skeleton explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the skeleton. Failure: 14 (4d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The skeleton sheds Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 15 feet.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The skeleton makes two attacks, using Flame Scepter or Hurl Flame in any combination.

action.name: Flame Scepter
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

action.name: Hurl Flame
entries: Ranged Attack: +4 to hit, range 60 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Fire damage.

monster.name: Flumph
languages: understands Undercommon but can't speak; telepathy 60 ft.

trait.name: Advanced Telepathy
entries: The flumph perceives the content of any telepathic communication within 60 feet of it.

trait.name: Prone Deficiency
entries: If the flumph receives the Prone condition, roll a die. On an odd number, it has the Incapacitated condition. At the end of each of its turns, the flumph makes a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, ending the Incapacitated condition on a success.

trait.name: Telepathic Shroud
entries: The flumph's thoughts can't be read by any means, and magic can't detect its location or observe it remotely.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 feet. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Acid damage.

action.name: Stench Spray (1/Day)
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature the flumph can see within 15 feet. Failure: The target is coated in a foul-smelling liquid, exudes a stench for 1d4 hours, and has the Poisoned condition while the stench lasts. Other creatures have the Poisoned condition while in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the coated target. The target can remove the stench on itself if it bathes during a Short or Long Rest.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The fomorian makes two Stone Club attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Warping Hex if available.

action.name: Stone Club
entries: Melee Attack: +9 to hit, reach 15 ft. Hit: 24 (4d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Warping Hex (Recharge 4-6)
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the fomorian can see within 120 feet. Failure: 21 (6d6) Psychic damage, and the target gains 1 Exhaustion level. Success: Half damage only.

walk.condition: (30 ft. when rolling, 60 ft. rolling downhill)

action.name: Avalanche Slam
entries: Melee Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the galeb duhr moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

action.name: Animate Boulders (1/Day)
entries: The galeb duhr magically animates one or two boulders it can see within 60 feet of itself. Each boulder uses the Galeb Duhr stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1 and lacks this action. The boulder takes its turn immediately after the galeb duhr on the same Initiative count, and it obeys the galeb duhr. A boulder remains animate for 1 minute or until it or the galeb duhr dies.

trait.name: Death Burst
entries: The gas spore bursts when it dies. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation originating from the gas spore. Failure: The target takes 10 (3d6) Poison damage and has the Poisoned condition for 1d12 hours. Unless the Poisoned condition is removed, the target dies at the end of that time and sprouts 2d4 Tiny Gas Spore Fungi (each with 1 Hit Point). After 2d6 days, they become Large and have 13 Hit Points.

action.name: Tendril
entries: Melee Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Stench
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, any creature that starts its turn in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the ghast. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this ghast's Stench for 24 hours.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The ghast casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability:
At will: Speak with Dead, Thaumaturgy.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghast makes two Horrific Necrosis attacks. It can replace one attack with a Claw attack.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target isn't an Undead, it has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Horrific Necrosis
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Necrotic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The axe beak makes one Sharpened Beak attack and one Talons attack.

action.name: Sharpened Beak
entries: Melee Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 (2d12 + 5) Slashing damage, and a creature within 5 feet of the target (axe beak's choice) takes 6 (1d12) Slashing damage.

action.name: Talons
entries: Melee Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The crab can breathe air and water.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 11) from one of two claws.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The rat has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the rat's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 feet. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The squid can breathe only underwater.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The squid makes one Bite attack and one Tentacle attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 28 (4d10 + 6) Piercing damage.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: Melee Attack: +9 to hit, reach 15 ft. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 16) from one of two tentacles, and the squid can pull the target up to 10 feet straight toward itself.

reaction.name: Ink Cloud (1/Day)
entries: Trigger: The squid takes damage while underwater. Response: The squid releases ink that fills a 15-foot Cube centered on itself, and the squid moves up to its Swim Speed. The Cube is Heavily Obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The toad can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The toad's Long Jump is up to 20 feet and its High Jump is up to 10 feet with or without a running start.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12).

action.name: Swallow
entries: The toad swallows a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the toad. In addition, the target takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage at the end of each of the toad's turns. The toad can have only one target swallowed at a time, and it can't use Bite while it has a swallowed target. If the toad dies, a swallowed creature is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the Prone condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The githyanki casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18, +10 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible).
2/day each: Nondetection (self only), Plane Shift, Tongues.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The githyanki makes three Draconic Strike attacks.

action.name: Draconic Strike
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 17 (5d6) Fire damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the githyanki's next turn.

action.name: Conjured Dragon's Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 90-foot Cone. Failure: 27 (6d8) Fire damage plus 27 (6d8) Force damage. Success: Half damage.

bonus.name: Misty Step (3/Day)
entries: The githyanki casts Misty Step, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The githyanki casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible).
1/day each: Plane Shift, Telekinesis.
2/day each: Nondetection (self only), Tongues.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The githyanki makes three Silver Sword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Telekinesis if available.

action.name: Silver Sword
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 14 (4d6) Psychic damage. Critical Hit: If the target is in an astral body (as with the Astral Projection spell), the githyanki can cut the silvery cord that tethers the target to its material body instead of dealing damage.

bonus.name: Misty Step (2/Day)
entries: The githyanki casts Misty Step, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The githyanki casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability:
At will: Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible).
2/day: Nondetection (self only).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The githyanki makes two Psi Blade attacks.

action.name: Psi Blade
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Misty Step (2/Day)
entries: The githyanki casts Misty Step, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The githzerai casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:
At will: Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible).
1/day: See Invisibility.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The githzerai makes two Psi Strike attacks.

action.name: Psi Strike
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Psi-Powered Leap (2/Day)
entries: The githzerai casts Jump, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

reaction.name: Psionic Defense (2/Day)
entries: The githzerai casts Feather Fall or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The githzerai casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible).
1/day each: Plane Shift, See Invisibility.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The githzerai makes three Psychic Warp attacks.

action.name: Psychic Warp
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 26 (4d10 + 4) Psychic damage, and the target has the githzerai's choice of (A) the Charmed condition until the start of the githzerai's next turn or (B) the Prone condition, provided the target is a Large or smaller creature.

reaction.name: Psionic Defense
entries: The githzerai casts Feather Fall or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The githzerai casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible).
1/day each: Phantasmal Killer (level 6 version), Plane Shift, See Invisibility.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The githzerai makes two Psi Strike attacks.

action.name: Psi Strike
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Psi-Powered Leap (2/Day)
entries: The githzerai casts Jump, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

reaction.name: Psionic Defense (2/Day)
entries: The githzerai casts Feather Fall or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gnoll makes two Abyssal Strike attacks.

action.name: Abyssal Strike
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 20 (5d6 + 3) Poison damage.

action.name: Hunger of Yeenoghu (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The gnoll conjures a 30-foot Cube of magical Darkness originating from a point it can see within 60 feet, which lasts for 1 minute or until the gnoll's Concentration ends on it. This area is Difficult Terrain. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, any creature that starts its turn in this area or enters it for the first time on a turn. Failure: 28 (8d6) Necrotic damage, and the gnoll or a creature of its choice it can see gains 10 Temporary Hit Points. Success: Half damage only.

bonus.name: Rampage (2/Day)
entries: Immediately after dealing damage to a creature that is already Bloodied, the gnoll moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Abyssal Strike attack.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gnoll makes one Bite attack and two Bone Flail attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the gnoll's next turn.

action.name: Bone Flail
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Rampage (2/Day)
entries: Immediately after dealing damage to a creature that is already Bloodied, the gnoll moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Bite attack.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gnoll makes two attacks, using Bone Whip or Bone Javelin in any combination, and it uses Incite Rampage if available.

action.name: Bone Whip
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) Slashing damage.

action.name: Bone Javelin
entries: Ranged Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/120 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

action.name: Incite Rampage (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The gnoll targets another creature it can see within 60 feet of itself that has the Rampage Bonus Action. The target can take a Reaction to make one melee attack.

bonus.name: Rampage (2/Day)
entries: Immediately after dealing damage to a creature that is already Bloodied, the gnoll moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Bone Whip attack.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The goblin casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Minor Illusion.
1/day each: Blindness/Deafness, Faerie Fire, Grease.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The goblin makes two Hex Stick attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Hex Stick
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) Psychic damage.

reaction.name: Jinx
entries: Trigger: A creature the goblin can see hits it with an attack roll. Response:Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, the triggering creature. Failure: The attack misses instead.

action.name: Dagger
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the goristro dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The goristro has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The goristro deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The goristro makes one Brutal Gore attack and two Slam attacks.

action.name: Brutal Gore
entries: Melee Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 40 (6d10 + 7) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is pushed up to 20 feet straight away from the goristro and has the Prone condition.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Charge
entries: The goristro moves up to half its Speed straight toward an enemy it can see.

trait.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the revenant dies, it revives 24 hours later unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its remains. If it revives, it animates another group of corpses elsewhere on the same plane of existence; it now looks different but uses the same stat block and returns with all its Hit Points.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The revenant makes two Suffocate attacks.

action.name: Suffocate
entries: Melee Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 15). Until the grapple ends, the target is suffocating. The revenant can have up to two targets Grappled in this way at a time.

action.name: Haunting Glare (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the revenant. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The slaad regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The slaad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Invisibility (self only), Mage Hand, Major Image.
1/day each: Cloudkill, Fly, Plane Shift (self only), Tongues.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The slaad makes two Chaos Claw attacks.

action.name: Chaos Claw
entries: Melee Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage. Until the start of the slaad's next turn, the target has a condition determined by rolling 1d4: on a 1, Charmed; on a 2, Frightened; on a 3, Poisoned; or on a 4, Incapacitated.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The slaad shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The slaad regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The slaad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Mage Hand.
1/day each: Fireball, Invisibility (self only).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The slaad makes three Chaos Staff attacks.

action.name: Chaos Staff
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Force damage. Until the start of the slaad's next turn, the target has a condition determined by rolling 1d4: on a 1, Charmed; on a 2, Frightened; on a 3, Poisoned; or on a 4, Incapacitated.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The slaad shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

trait.name: Abduct
entries: The grell needn't spend extra movement to move a creature it is grappling.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grell makes one Beak attack and one Paralyzing Tentacles attack.

action.name: Beak
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

action.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12) from two of ten tentacles. The target is also subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While Poisoned, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grick makes one Beak attack, one Slam attack, and one Tentacles attack.

action.name: Beak
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

action.name: Tentacles
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from all four tentacles.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The guard makes two attacks, using Javelin or Longsword in any combination.

action.name: Javelin
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

action.name: Longsword
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Slashing damage.

trait.name: Blight Seeds
entries: When it finishes a Long Rest, the blight expels 1d6 seeds into unoccupied spaces on the ground within 30 feet of itself. After 24 hours, the seeds become creatures under the blight's control. Roll 1d8 for each seed to determine the creature it becomes: on 1-4, Twig Blight; on 5-6, Needle Blight; on 7-8, Vine Blight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The blight makes two attacks, using Slam or Thorn Volley in any combination. It also uses Life-Draining Root.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Thorn Volley
entries: Ranged Attack: +12 to hit, range 60/180 ft. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) Piercing damage.

action.name: Life-Draining Root
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, one Huge or smaller creature the blight can see within 30 feet. Failure: 14 (2d6 + 7) Necrotic damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 17) from one of six roots. Until the grapple ends, the target has the Restrained condition and takes 14 (4d6) Necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns. The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the blight regains Hit Points equal to that amount.

resist.special: Damage type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait below

trait.name: Draconic Origin
entries: The half-dragon is related to a type of dragon associated with one of the following damage types (DM's choice): Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. This choice affects other aspects of the stat block.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The half-dragon makes two Claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait.

action.name: Dragon's Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 28 (8d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait. Success: Half damage.

bonus.name: Leap
entries: The half-dragon jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

trait.name: Haunted Zone
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 17, any creature that casts a spell while inside the revenant's space. Failure: The spell fails and is wasted.

trait.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the revenant dies, it revives 24 hours later unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its remains. If it revives, it animates another Gargantuan object or structure elsewhere on the same plane of existence; it now looks different but uses the same stat block and returns with all its Hit Points.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The revenant makes two Object Slam attacks and uses Invitation.

action.name: Object Slam
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +9 to hit (with Advantage if the target is inside the revenant's space), reach 10 ft. or range 30/90 ft. Hit: 27 (5d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Invitation
entries: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 17, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: The target is teleported inside the revenant's space and swallowed. A swallowed creature has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the revenant.
While the revenant has Hit Points, a swallowed creature can leave the revenant's space only by using magic that enables planar travel, such as the Plane Shift spell.

monster.name: Helmed Horror
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The helmed horror has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spell Immunity
entries: The helmed horror is immune to three spells chosen by its creator. Typical choices include Heat Metal, Lightning Bolt, and Magic Missile.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The helmed horror makes two Arcane Sword attacks.

action.name: Arcane Sword
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 5 (1d10) Force damage.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The hippopotamus can hold its breath for 10 minutes.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hippopotamus makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Aura of Authority
entries: While in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the hobgoblin, the hobgoblin and its allies have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the hobgoblin doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hobgoblin makes three attacks, using Javelin or Longsword in any combination.

action.name: Javelin
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the start of the hobgoblin's next turn.

action.name: Longsword
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: Trigger: The hobgoblin is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The hobgoblin adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hook horror makes two Hook attacks.

action.name: Hook
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the hook horror moves the target 5 feet straight toward or away from itself.

trait.name: Succubus Form
entries: When the incubus finishes a Long Rest, it can shape-shift into a Succubus, using that stat block instead of this one. Any equipment it's wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The incubus casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Disguise Self, Etherealness.
1/day each: Dream, Hypnotic Pattern.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The incubus makes two Restless Touch attacks.

action.name: Restless Touch
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 24 hours or until the incubus dies. Until the curse ends, the target gains no benefit from finishing Short Rests.

bonus.name: Nightmare (Recharge 6)
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature the incubus can see within 60 feet. Failure: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it has the Unconscious condition for 1 hour, until it takes damage, or until a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. Otherwise, the target takes 18 (4d8) Psychic damage.

monster.name: Intellect Devourer
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak; telepathy 60 ft.

trait.name: Detect Intelligence
entries: The intellect devourer magically senses the location of any creature within 300 feet of itself that has an Intelligence score of 3 or higher, regardless of interposing barriers.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The intellect devourer makes one Claw attack and uses Devour Intellect.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

action.name: Devour Intellect
entries: Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the intellect devourer can see within 5 feet. Failure: 11 (2d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the end of the intellect devourer's next turn.

action.name: Steal Body
entries: Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 12, one Small or Medium creature within 5 feet that has the Incapacitated condition, is a Humanoid or Beast, and has 10 Hit Points or fewer. Failure: The intellect devourer possesses the target, consumes its brain, and teleports inside its skull. While there, the intellect devourer has Total Cover against attacks and other effects originating outside its host. The intellect devourer retains its Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; its understanding of Deep Speech; its telepathy; and its Detect Intelligence trait. It otherwise adopts the target's game statistics. It knows everything the target knew, including spells and languages.

If the host body dies, the intellect devourer must leave it. The intellect devourer is also forced out if the target regains its devoured brain by means of a Wish spell. By spending 5 feet of its movement, the intellect devourer can voluntarily leave the body, teleporting to the nearest unoccupied space within 5 feet of it. The body then dies unless its brain is restored before the end of the intellect devourer's next turn.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The jackalwere has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the jackalwere's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The jackalwere makes two Rend or Slam attacks.

action.name: Rend (Jackal or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

action.name: Slam (Human or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Sleep Gaze (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature the jackalwere can see within 30 feet (Constructs and Undead succeed automatically). Failure: The target has the Unconscious condition for 10 minutes or until it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. Success: The target is immune to this jackalwere's Sleep Gaze for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The jackalwere shape-shifts into a Medium human or a Medium jackal-humanoid hybrid, or it returns to its true form (that of a Small jackal). Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

trait.name: Living Shadow
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the dragon has Resistance to damage that isn't Force, Psychic, or Radiant.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the dragon has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Shadow Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 17 (5d6) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage. Success or Failure: A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage dies, and a Shadow rises from its corpse. The shadow is under the dragon's control and shares the dragon's Initiative count but acts immediately after the dragon.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the dragon takes the Hide action.

trait.name: Mimicry
entries: The kenku can mimic any sounds it has heard, including voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

action.name: Shadow Blade
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Necrotic damage. Hit or Miss: The blade magically returns to the kenku's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

bonus.name: Eldritch Lantern (Recharge 4-6)
entries: The kenku casts Faerie Fire, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 10).

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The whale can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 21 (5d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Spear
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

action.name: Sticky Net (1/Day)
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, one Large or smaller creature the kuo-toa can see within 15 feet. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition until the net is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage). A creature can take an action to make a DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check to free itself or another creature in a net within 5 feet, destroying the net on a success.

reaction.name: Sticky Shield
entries: Trigger: A creature misses the kuo-toa with a melee attack roll using a weapon. Response:Strength Saving Throw: DC 11, the triggering creature. Failure: The attack's weapon sticks to the kuo-toa's shield. If the target doesn't let go of the weapon, the target has the Grappled condition while the weapon is stuck (escape DC 11). While stuck, the weapon can't be used. The target can take an action to make a DC 11 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing the weapon on a success.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The kuo-toa casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Detect Magic, Thaumaturgy.
1/day each: Destructive Wave, Divination, Hold Monster (level 6 version), Scrying, Tongues.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The kuo-toa makes three Strange Scepter attacks.

action.name: Strange Scepter
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 20 (5d6 + 3) Lightning damage.

bonus.name: Shield of Faith (2/Day)
entries: The kuo-toa casts Shield of Faith, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The kuo-toa makes two Bone Whip attacks.

action.name: Bone Whip
entries: Melee Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Lightning damage, and the target can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of the kuo-toa's next turn.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Pincer Staff
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12). Until the grapple ends, the kuo-toa can't make Pincer Staff attacks.

action.name: Conjure Slimy Glob
entries: Ranged Attack: +4 to hit, range 60 ft. Hit: 9 (3d4 + 2) Acid damage.

bonus.name: Shield of Faith (2/Day)
entries: The kuo-toa casts Shield of Faith, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghoul makes two Icy Bite attacks.

action.name: Icy Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Cold damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 5 feet until the start of the ghoul's next turn.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't an Undead or elf, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

bonus.name: Watery Rush
entries: While underwater, the ghoul moves up to half its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

monster.name: Larva
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The lizardfolk casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):
At will: Elementalism.
1/day each: Meld into Stone, Speak with Plants, Spike Growth.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lizardfolk makes two Earth Burst attacks.

action.name: Earth Burst
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Hail of Stone (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point the lizardfolk can see within 60 feet. Failure: 15 (6d4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (2d4) Slashing damage.

trait.name: Contortionist
entries: The manes can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

trait.name: Sickening Vapors
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the manes at the end of the manes's turn. Failure: The target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this manes's Sickening Vapors for 24 hours.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 5 (2d4) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the manes takes the Hide action.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The marid can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the marid dies outside the Elemental Plane of Water, its body dissolves into brine, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Water.

trait.name: Wishes
entries: The marid has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the marid knows it, the marid can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the marid can understand. If the marid casts the spell for the creature, the marid suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the marid has cast it three times, the marid can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The marid casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Create or Destroy Water, Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Purify Food and Drink.
1/day each: Control Water, Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Plane Shift, Tongues.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The marid makes three Aquatic Lash attacks.

action.name: Aquatic Lash
entries: Melee Attack: +10 to hit, reach 15 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Cold damage.

action.name: Water Jet
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot-long, 10-foot-wide Line. Failure: 31 (9d6) Cold damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is pushed up to 20 feet straight away from the marid and has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

bonus.name: Misty Veil (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The marid casts Fog Cloud, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The merfolk can breathe air and water.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The merfolk casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Elementalism, Light.
1/day each: Control Water, Create or Destroy Water.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The merfolk makes two Aquatic Burst attacks.

action.name: Aquatic Burst
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) Cold damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

reaction.name: Watery Rebuke
entries: Trigger: An enemy the merfolk can see enters a space within 5 feet of the merfolk. Response:Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, the triggering enemy. Failure: 14 (4d6) Cold damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is pushed up to 30 feet straight away from the merfolk by conjured water.

trait.name: Fiendish Restoration
entries: If the mezzoloth dies outside Gehenna, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Gehenna.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The mezzoloth has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The mezzoloth casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
1/day each: Cloudkill, Darkness, Dispel Magic.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mezzoloth makes two attacks, using Claws or Mercurial Trident in any combination.

action.name: Claws
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from two of four claws, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Mercurial Trident
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Force damage. Hit or Miss: The trident magically returns to the mezzoloth's claw immediately after a ranged attack.

bonus.name: Teleport (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The mezzoloth teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. It can teleport one creature it is grappling to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of its destination space.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The mind flayer has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The mind flayer casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Detect Thoughts.
1/day each: Dominate Monster, Plane Shift (self only).

action.name: Tentacles
entries: Melee Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) Psychic damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from all the mind flayer's tentacles, and the target has the Stunned condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Extract Brain
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature that is Grappled by the mind flayer's Tentacles. Failure: 55 (10d10) Piercing damage. Success: Half damage. Success or Failure: If this damage reduces the target to 0 Hit Points, the mind flayer kills it and devours its brain.

action.name: Mind Blast (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 31 (6d8 + 4) Psychic damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the end of the mind flayer's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The mind flayer has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: The mind flayer casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Disguise Self, Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible).
1/day each: Clairvoyance, Dimension Door, Fireball (level 5 version), Lightning Bolt (level 5 version), Plane Shift (self only), Sending.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mind flayer makes three Arcane Tentacles attacks.

action.name: Arcane Tentacles
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) Psychic damage, and the mind flayer can teleport the target up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space the mind flayer can see on a surface or liquid large enough to support the target.
